packages.name: The Glow Reset
packages.tagline: Camera-ready radiance for your big moment.
packages.forWho: Events, weddings, or a monthly refresh
packages.desc: Our go-to for instant, no-downtime glow. Perfect on its own before an event, or booked monthly to keep skin bright, hydrated, and healthy year-round.

packages.name: The Skin Rebuild
packages.tagline: Rebuild your skin — don't break it down.
packages.forWho: Fine lines, texture, acne scarring, firmness
packages.desc: Our signature corrective series. A course of ProCell Microchanneling rebuilds collagen and elastin from within, with a Glo2Facial in between to keep skin nourished and glowing while it renews.

packages.name: Clarity & Renewal
packages.desc: A bio-stimulating peel series that resurfaces and rebuilds with little to no downtime — ideal for clearing congestion, smoothing texture, and evening out tone over time.

packages.name: Age Management Membership
packages.tagline: Consistency is the secret to great skin.
packages.forWho: Anyone committed to long-term skin health
packages.desc: Skin renews on a cycle, and the best results come from showing up for it. A monthly treatment — tailored each visit to what your skin needs — keeps you ahead of aging, congestion, and dullness.
